title: plantago limensis
intro: Plantago limensis, also known as the Peruvian plantain, is a type of flowering plant in the plantain family that is native to the Andean regions of South America. The leaves of this plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Plantago limensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Plantago limensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
